positioning.oneLiner: CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
positioning.summary: CARE Coaching provides tailored professional development, workshops, program evaluations, and personalized coaching that help educators reflect on current practice and implement research-based actions. Its source language emphasizes customized support, practical educator-led professional learning, multilingual learner support where relevant, and sustained continuous improvement.

audiences.name: district EL leaders
needs: Support multilingual learner instruction without generic professional development
Use action-based data to identify growth areas
Build educator capacity through coaching and continuous improvement
approvedMessages: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
The CARE Coaching Needs Assessment identifies strengths, uncovers growth areas, and guides education leaders with action-based data.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
ctaSuggestions: Explore the CARE Coaching Needs Assessment
Connect with WCEPS about multilingual learner support

audiences.name: school leaders
needs: Turn staff learning into practical classroom actions
Plan professional learning around specific instructional needs
approvedMessages: CARE Coaching offerings help educators reflect on current practices and implement research-based actions.
CARE Coaching offers professional learning, program evaluations, personalized coaching, and scheduling designed around educator availability.
The CARE approach emphasizes reflection, strategy development, and continuous improvement.

audiences.name: educators
needs: Connect coaching to current classroom practice
Support students through more inclusive instruction
approvedMessages: CARE Coaching professional learning is led by educators and designed to be meaningful and practical.
CARE Coaching focuses on reflective practice and research-based actions.
CARE Coaching supports educator growth through ongoing professional development and tailored programmatic support.
ctaSuggestions: Learn more about CARE Coaching topics
Connect with the CARE Coaching team

proofPoints: The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The CARE Coaching page lists professional learning, coaching, CCNA, and educator-friendly scheduling as customizable supports.
The CCNA page says the assessment identifies strengths, uncovers growth areas, and supports school improvement and professional development planning.
The Pathways products page describes CARE Coaching as collaborative educator support with reflective and data-driven practices.
approvedPhrases: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
school improvement and professional development planning
restrictedClaims: Do not guarantee measurable outcomes; the source describes coaching to ensure outcomes are achieved and sustained, but generated copy should remain reviewable and conservative.
Do not invent new district partnership numbers beyond those present in source evidence.
Do not claim CARE Coaching is only for multilingual learners; sources also describe broader instructional practices.

imageKeywords: coach and school leader reviewing notes

flyer.headlinePattern: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner

sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching Three Cs
sourceEvidence.excerpt: The WCEPS CARE Coaching program supports educators by focusing on the Three Cs: Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.

sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching support model
sourceEvidence.excerpt: Our professional learning offerings are designed to help educators reflect on their current practices and implement research-based actions that lead to meaningful change.

sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching customizable offerings
sourceEvidence.excerpt: We customize our work to meet your unique needs, offering the CARE Coaching Needs Assessment, professional learning, coaching, and scheduling designed to accommodate educators' availability.

sourceEvidence.label: CCNA purpose
sourceEvidence.excerpt: The CARE Coaching Needs Assessment identifies strengths, uncovers growth areas, and guides education leaders with action-based data to support school improvement and professional development planning.

sourceEvidence.label: Products page CARE overview
sourceEvidence.excerpt: CARE Coaching is described through collaborative educator support, reflective and data-driven practices, and student-centered growth.
